use_cases: Top navigation header for SaaS landing pages and web applications
Minimal navigation bar for dark-themed portfolio or product sites
Mobile-responsive site header with animated menu toggle
Compact navigation for developer tools or technical products
Clean site navigation with subtle hover interactions
ai_summary: A minimalist dark-themed navigation bar featuring animated text links that slide upward on hover, a mobile hamburger menu toggle with smooth shape morphing animation (rounded-full to rounded-xl), and a decorative geometric dot-pattern logo. Built for modern web applications requiring clean, subtle navigation with responsive mobile support.
